libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Set native test runtime system properties for 5.0.1: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. Meaningful coverage should use Vertx.vertx(), WebClient/WebClientSession/CachingWebClient, and a local 127.0.0.1 Vert.x HttpServer; no external service is normally required. Avoid OAuth2WebClient coverage unless intentionally adding the optional OAuth dependency.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The failing native-image run remains authoritative; these properties address the documented Netty 4.2 Java 24+/25 unsafe default but local verification may reveal additional metadata needs.
OAuth2-specific APIs reference the optional io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2 dependency; base WebClient coverage does not require it.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Vert.x Web Client 5.0.1 uses Vert.x/Netty 4.2.x and meaningful tests can run against an in-process HTTP server, but Java 25 native runs need the same Netty unsafe-access runtime properties already used for 5.0.0.
